recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Burnt Money
recommendations.overview: Set in Argentina in 1965, the story follows the tumultuous relationship between two men who became lovers and ultimately ruthless bank robbers in a notoriously famous footnote in the annals of crime history. After a large-scale hold-up that turns blo

recommendations.title: Now You See Me
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent and an Interpol detective track a team of illusionists who pull off bank heists during their performances and reward their audiences with the money.

recommendations.title: How to Rob a Bank
recommendations.overview: Caught in the middle of a bank robbery, a slacker and a bank employee become the ones who arbitrate the intense situation.

recommendations.title: Vabank
recommendations.overview: October 1934. Poland. Famous bank robber Kwinto decided to quit his dangerous criminal job, but after his friend's death, he changed his mind and organized a burglary of famous and well protected bank which belonged to his former partner in crime, ba

recommendations.title: Argentina 1985
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a team of lawyers takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship in a battle against odds and a race against time.

recommendations.title: Masterminds
recommendations.overview: A night guard at an armored car company in the Southern U.S. organizes one of the biggest bank heists in American history.

recommendations.title: The Vault
recommendations.overview: Two estranged sisters are forced to rob a bank in order to save their brother. But this is no ordinary bank.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: Army of Thieves
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman recruits bank teller Ludwig Dieter to lead a group of aspiring thieves on a top-secret heist during the early stages of the zombie apocalypse.
